div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

li.a: Endpoint Chile Trustlist (DID v2) - UAT - All keys did:web:tng-cdn.who.int:v2:trustlist:-:CHL resolvable at https://tng-cdn-uat.who.int/v2/trustlist/-/CHL/did.json

Endpoint Chile Trustlist (DID v2) - UAT - Certificate Signing Authority did:web:tng-cdn.who.int:v2:trustlist:-:CHL:SCA resolvable at https://tng-cdn-uat.who.int/v2/trustlist/-/CHL/SCA/did.json
